description.initial: The northernmost edge of the western lands. Rolling hills fade into grey emptiness to the west, swept by a constant wind. The Enchanted Forest is visible in the distance to the east.
description.return: The northern border of the western lands. Wild, untamed country stretches westward beyond the horizon.
description.atmospheric: The wind carries the scent of distant rain. This feels like the edge of the known world.

north.blockedMessage: The hills roll onward into grey emptiness. The world simply ends here.

west.blockedMessage: The wild lands stretch endlessly westward into nothing. There is no reason to go that way.
